test case id: tc-eventcreation-001 title: create event with valid inputs module: event creation source pages: 1,2,3 preconditions: user is logged in. test data: - event title: new event - event date: 2023-10-10 - event type: concert - city: rome - description: this is a new event. test steps: 1. navigate to the city view screen. 2. scroll down and click the '+' button to add a new event. 3. fill in the event title, date, type, city, and description fields with the provided test data. 4. click the submit button. expected result: - event is created successfully. - event details are displayed on the city view screen.
